title: alibertia stipularis
intro: Alibertia stipularis, also known as the 'Yellow Bells' or 'Yellow Trumpet', is a flowering plant native to the Amazon rainforest region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Alibertia stipularis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in traditional medicine to create remedies for respiratory issues and digestive problems.
